clinical_blockers: People younger than 18 years are outside the exact source.
Specific dysphagia, odynophagia, weight-loss, vomiting, anaemia, and black-stool fields require more specific exact alarm-feature sources and remain unsupported here except acute GI bleeding.
Examination fields, generic blood tests, previous records, generic clinician plan, safety-netting, fixed follow-up ranges, PRN wording, and autonomous interpretation remain unsupported.
Diagnosis, investigation selection, treatment, medicine dosing, referral urgency, and qualified clinician review remain clinician responsibilities.
